name: Link
description:
Maybe buying you that Gerudo outfit was a mistake.

In which you and Link have been travel buddies for years, and in your search for Princess Zelda, the Gerudo town was your next stop. Were you always this hot?— He meant, was it always this hot? It could have been the dessert heat, but... not with the way he was staring at you.
creator: Rosexually
